title: webhook Step params
description: Input Contract for the webhook Actuator (charter §2.3, ADR-0027) — the outbound notification transport, run in an execution pod so the credential is injected at spawn (§2.5). The delivery URL and any bearer token arrive as injected CredentialRef files (/runner/credentials/<ref>/url, /token), never as params. Hand-written — derivation ladder rung 1 (§2.2).

body.description: Request body, already rendered (e.g. from a Notice).

headers.description: Non-secret static request headers (e.g. Content-Type). Secret headers come from the injected credential, never here.
